reasoning: The CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index (OVX) is currently at 37.90 as of mid-October 2025. Historically, OVX tends to have a median in the low 30s during stable market regimes, typically hovering between 25 and 35. Volatility indices exhibit strong mean-reverting properties. Because 37.90 is slightly elevated above the long-run median, there is a moderately higher probability that the index will drift downward and revert to the mean over the coming months rather than increase further, barring a new exogenous shock to oil markets. Therefore, the probability of an increase from the October 26 baseline by the unlisted resolution date(s) is estimated at slightly below 50%.
